name: Switchback Warden
title: The Warden of the Folded Road

arena.summary: A cliffside shelf road where the slope, the bend, and the edge all compete for attention.

phases.name: Steep Approach
phases.summary: The road starts to fall away and the Warden dares the player to speed up.

phases.name: Hairpin Surge
phases.summary: The turns tighten and the Warden tries to force a late entry.

phases.name: Fogged Edge
phases.summary: Visibility drops and the Warden leans on hesitation and panic alike.

phases.name: Quiet Descent
phases.summary: The Warden loses power when the player keeps the line calm and controlled.

intro: The ridge is steep because you made it late.
The drop is patient. Are you?
phaseShift: You braked after the slope woke up.
You steered too late for the bend.
defeat: You chose control before the fall.
The folded road opens for the disciplined.
victory: The Warden falls back into the fog.

attackLines.summary: The road feels like it is pulling the car faster than it should.
A hairpin closes the line if the player turns in late.
A bank of haze hides the lane edge and dares a rushed guess.
